key.name: show-remain
key.summary: Show remaining time and percentage in timeout progress bar

key.name: combo-always-editable
key.summary: Combo-box in entry dialog is always editable

key.name: terminal
key.summary: Default terminal command (use %s for arguments placeholder)

key.name: open-command
key.summary: Default open command (use %s for arguments placeholder)

key.name: date-format
key.summary: Default date format (see strftime(3) for details)

key.name: uri-color
key.summary: Default color for URI in text-info dialog

key.name: max-tab
key.summary: Maximum number of tabs in notebook dialog

key.name: large-preview
key.summary: Use large previews in file selection dialogs

key.name: debug
key.summary: Enable debug mode with information about deprecated features
